====Pokémon====
This listing is of Skyla's known {{OBP|Pokémon|species}} in {{aniseries|PTS}}:
{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Skyla
|pkmn=Swoobat
|type1=Psychic
|type2=Flying
|img=Skyla Swoobat.png
|epnum=BW067
|epname=Cilan Takes Flight!
|vajp=Kiyotaka Furushima
|vaen=Michele Knotz
|desc={{p|Swoobat}} is one of Skyla's three Pokémon. In her battle against Cilan, Swoobat was able to easily defeat his {{TP|Cilan|Pansage}} with {{m|Gust}}. However, it quickly fell to [[Cilan's Crustle]] following a {{m|Rock Wrecker}} attack. It later appeared in ''[[BW068|An Amazing Aerial Battle!]]'', where it defeated [[Ash's Krokorok]], but fell to [[Ash's Tranquill]].

Swoobat's known moves are {{m|Supersonic}}{{tt|*|Only seen in an Air Battle}}, {{m|Air Cutter}}, and {{m|Gust}}.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Skyla
|pkmn=Unfezant
|gender=male
|type1=Normal
|type2=Flying
|img=Skyla Unfezant.png
|epnum=BW067
|epname=Cilan Takes Flight!
|vajp=Akeno Watanabe
|vaen=Erica Schroeder
|desc={{p|Unfezant}} is one of Skyla's three Pokémon. He was quickly defeated by [[Cilan's Crustle]] in Skyla's battle with him even though he proven to be quite resilient enough to handle Crustle's {{m|Rock Wrecker}}. He reappeared in ''[[BW068|An Amazing Aerial Battle!]]'' as the second Pokémon Skyla called upon against {{Ash}}. He battled [[Ash's Tranquill]], though she was [[recall]]ed for {{AP|Pikachu}}. After a tough fight, {{p|Pikachu}} triumphed over Unfezant with {{m|Electro Ball}}.

Unfezant's known moves are {{m|Pluck}}, {{m|Air Slash}}, and {{m|Aerial Ace}}.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|main=yes
|trainer=Skyla
|pkmn=Swanna
|type1=Water
|type2=Flying
|img=Skyla Swanna.png
|epnum=BW067
|epname=Cilan Takes Flight!
|vajp=Chiaki Takahashi
|vaen=Chiaki Takahashi
|vaen2=Kana Ueda
|vaen2note={{tt|*|Skyla's Japanese voice was used to voice it in some parts}}
|desc={{p|Swanna}} is one of Skyla's three Pokémon. In Skyla's battle with {{an|Cilan}}, it was able to defeat his {{TP|Cilan|Crustle}}. It struggled a bit battling {{TP|Cilan|Stunfisk}}, which it had a [[type]] disadvantage with and was also {{status|burn}}ed by its {{m|Scald}}. However, thanks to its Aqua Ring, it was able to overcome its burn and defeated Stunfisk.

It appeared again in {{Ash}}'s Gym battle against Skyla in ''[[BW068|An Amazing Aerial Battle!]]''. Similarly to Cilan's Stunfisk, who had a type advantage, Pikachu fell to Swanna. Tranquill battled against Swanna and won thanks to its [[Evolution]] into Unfezant and learning the move {{m|Aerial Ace}}.}}
